symbols.name: windmotor

provenance.reference_role: OpenCPN wind symbol witnesses and S-52 metadata drive generated-owned redraw

symbols.required_change: Redraw as the brown windmotor structure with rotor, mast, base line, and base ring/dot treatment from the references.

semantic_brief.brief: WIMCON01 is windmotor. It is used as a windmotor. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
semantic_brief.required_shape: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference
safety_invariants: Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family.
Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order.
Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present.
Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.
